temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with glasses and dark hair, wearing a suit and tie. He looks down with a concerned or anxious expression. In the foreground, the out-of-focus hand of another person is visible, holding a lit cigarette that emits a bright, glowing light. The background is dark and indistinct. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters are displayed. The camera cuts to a close-up of a second man. He has short, dark hair and is smoking the cigarette, looking off to the side with a calm, contemplative gaze. Smoke curls from his mouth. The background remains dark and shadowy. The same white Chinese characters are visible in the top left corner. The shot returns to the first man with glasses. He continues to look down, his expression unchanged, as the bright light from the cigarette illuminates the scene. The camera remains in a tight close-up, emphasizing his worried demeanor. The white text is still present in the upper left of the frame. A man speaks in a calm and steady voice, his tone carrying a hint of concern as he asks, "叫我来问你家里有没有什么要帮忙的" (He asked me to come and ask if you need any help at home). The background is quiet, with no music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the tense and direct dialogue.
